name: Bug Report

labels: bug

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command: `autodocgen ...`
2. With this config / source file: ...
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- AutoDocGen version: [e.g. 0.1.0 — run `autodocgen --version`]
- OpenAI model used: [e.g. gpt-4o]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant context, config files, or sample source files.
